case_title: KHUU PHAT TAN VS. SCHRAMKO SONDRA NOEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-14-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KHUU PHAT TAN IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY HONG HA, COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPERTER. DEFENDANT SCHRAMKO SONDRA NOEL IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-16-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PHAT TAN KHUUU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER HONG HA. DEFENDANT SCHRAMKO SONDRA NOEL IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S ATTEMPTED SERVICE WAS IMPROPER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY KHUU, PHAT TAN AS TO DEFENDANT NOEL, SCHRAMKO SONDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHUU, PHAT TAN AS TO DEFENDANT NOEL, SCHRAMKO SONDRA
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: A. DATT. / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
